hero.title: Kufinyeleleka
hero.lead: I-IATF ihlose kugcina le-website ilula, ifundzeka malula, ifinyeleleka ngekubhala, futsi ihambisana netinhlelo tekusita.
support: I-IATF isebentisa i-Web Accessibility [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Kufinyeleleka lokusebentako kuphindze kutfolakale kulokuhlangenwe nako kwalabasebentisi bemitfombolusito yelusito.

paragraphs: Uma utfola tintfo letingavumeleki kulewebhusayithi, sicela ubike ngekutfumela i-imeyili ku:
items: ngabe nguyiphi i-assistive technology, i-browser nobe i-device loyisebentisako, uma ikhona
report.footnote: Akudzingeki kutsi ubhale umbiko wesiphazamisi ngalokusemtsetfweni. Inchazelo lecacile yanele.

paragraphs: Tindzaba letiphatselene nekufinyeleleka tingafingcwa kuloluhlelo lolusemtsetfweni lwekugcina imibhalo kute tilungiswe ekuvulekeni. imininingwane yekuchumana yemuntfu kanye nemininingwane yangasese lengadzingeki iyasuswa ngaphambi kwekushicilelwa.
Nangabe umbiko wakho uhlanganisa kwatiswa lokungasiko kwebantfu, kusho loko ngalokucacile emlayetweni.
Lelikhasi lincane ngemabomu futsi aligucuki. letinye tilwimi tingase tibe tingakapheleli ngalesikhatsi kulungiselelwa kuhunyushwa.
